pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh which cleans it, export_result.sh which processes it, and task description
Found in verifier.py reading logic, setup_task.sh cleanup operations, and export_result.sh

privileged_info_summary: The target DICOM data is a real X-Ray Angiography sample (0002.DCM) downloaded from Rubo Medical (www.rubomedical.com) into a directory named 'ct_scan', which the environment treats as a CT scan. The expected screenshot of the RECIST annotations must be exported to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/recist_annotation.png and the corresponding text report of the measured values to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/recist_report.txt.
